sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na lungsung Topa’n thupha a dimtak hong piakna ding in,
Pa’ hong ciamna muang in la,
A hong cih bang hong pai in,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na lungsim dimlet dong tu ni’n hong dim ding hi,
Na lungsung dimlet dong tu ni’n hong dim ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh’ sisan’ sianthosak sa na leibeel te hong keng
Hong pai un a samdang zong;
Pasian to khom mai-ah na pumpi kipia inla ngak in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sathau bei ngeilo bangin hong heh pih na’n bei hun
Ama hong kamciamsa bangin Kha Siangtho le vangliatna,
